narrative:
16 Ohio Senate district has 259,254 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.2% D−R vs -9.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
